title: ac_concepts
description: Analysis Concept model schema: 3-level SKOS-inspired hierarchy of Statistical Concepts (atoms), Result Patterns (molecules), and Categories (groupings). Validates AC vocabulary files.

version.description: Semantic version of the AC concept model

description.description: Human-readable description of the model (SKOS: skos:note)

valueTypes.description: Relative path to the shared FHIR value type vocabulary

designPrinciples.description: Guiding design principles for this concept model

qualifierTypes.description: Reference to CDDM shared qualifier types

sharedStatisticsVocabulary.description: Level 1 Statistical Concepts — the atomic building blocks. Both methods and result patterns reference them.

concepts.description: Map of concept name (SKOS: prefLabel) to StatisticalConcept definition

resultPatterns.description: Level 2 Result Patterns — groups of statistical concepts with identifying dimensions (SKOS: narrower than Category)

categories.description: Level 3 Categories — groups of result patterns that typically appear together (SKOS: broadest concepts)

methodOutputSlotMapping.description: Maps method OIDs to their output slot → result pattern name mappings. Bridges the method layer to the AC concept layer.

additionalProperties.description: Map of method output slot name to result pattern name

Cardinality.description: Multiplicity of a relationship between concept levels
Cardinality.title: Cardinality

FHIRPrimitiveType.description: FHIR R5 primitive data types used for statistical concept values
FHIRPrimitiveType.title: FHIRPrimitiveType

StatisticalConcept.description: Level 1 atom: an individual statistical data point with its own identity. SKOS: skos:Concept within the AC ConceptScheme.

definition.description: Human-readable definition of this statistical concept (SKOS: skos:definition)

dataType.description: FHIR primitive data type of values for this concept

statoMapping.description: STATO ontology code for this concept, e.g. STATO:0000599 (SKOS: skos:notation / skos:exactMatch)

ResultPattern.description: Level 2 molecule: a named group of statistical concepts that belong together and should be interpreted together. Defines the identifying dimensions for each instance. SKOS: skos:Concept, narrower than its Category.

definition.description: Human-readable definition of this result pattern (SKOS: skos:definition)

constituents.description: Names of statistical concepts that compose this pattern (references sharedStatisticsVocabulary keys)

dimensions.description: Dimension names that identify each instance of this pattern (e.g. group, visit, term, contrast)

Category.description: Level 3 grouping: groups result patterns that typically appear together in the same kind of analysis. SKOS: skos:Collection or broadest skos:Concept.

definition.description: Human-readable definition of this analysis category (SKOS: skos:definition)

typicallyInvolves.description: Result pattern names typically produced by analyses in this category (SKOS: skos:narrower)

typicalMethods.description: Method OIDs typically used in this category
